summary: Backend testing for KRINTERIOR AI completed successfully. All 14 pytest tests passed: 6 auth tests (signup/login/me + negative cases) and 8 design+projects+vastu tests. Verified AI generation via Gemini Nano Banana + Gemini 2.5 Flash, full project CRUD, vastu re-analysis, and 401 enforcement on protected endpoints. No critical or minor backend issues found.

minor.issue: Backend logs show 'bcrypt has no attribute __about__' WARNING from passlib (cosmetic only - bcrypt still works correctly; hashing/verify pass). Consider pinning bcrypt<4 or upgrading passlib to silence the warning.

action_items: (Optional, non-blocking) Pin bcrypt<4 in backend/requirements.txt or upgrade passlib to remove the 'bcrypt has no attribute __about__' warning in backend logs.

(Optional) The /api/design/generate runs three text-LLM calls + one image edit sequentially with no timeout/retry wrapper; consider adding a graceful timeout/fallback if Gemini latency spikes for end users.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 487 lines, still within the <700 line guideline but trending up; consider splitting AI helpers and routers into separate modules when adding more features.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded in all responses (find_one/find with projection). Good.
EmailStr, Pydantic models, and HTTPBearer auth are correctly used; 401 is enforced on every protected endpoint.
JWT secret is loaded from .env (no hardcoded fallback). Good.
_extract_json safely handles fenced and raw JSON responses from the LLM; gracefully returns 502 on malformed AI output.
List endpoint correctly strips heavy image/array fields for performance, detail endpoint returns full payload.
seed_data_creation: Two ephemeral signup users created per pytest session (random emails like test_<uuid>@krinterior.io). One project created, renamed, vastu-reanalysed and deleted within the flow (TEST_LivingRoom_1 -> TEST_Renamed -> deleted). No leftover data of significance.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/results.xml`. Auth suite is fast (~2s). The design test calls real Gemini Nano Banana + Gemini 2.5 Flash and takes ~30-60s. Public base URL: https://vastu-spaces-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Test credentials are random per-session; primary fixture creates a fresh user via /api/auth/signup. The 1x1 PNG fixture in conftest.small_image_b64 is sufficient for the AI to accept the upload.
